name: Humane Endpoints and Necropsy
preprompt: Draft humane endpoint criteria and the necropsy workflow for animals reaching endpoint or dying naturally. Specify tissue collection, sample labeling, preservation, and any optional downstream banking that may support later mechanistic analyses.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only.
summary: Standardizes endpoint handling and biospecimen collection.
